titleStmt.title: SII 26.478: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 478. (A.R. No. 455 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same maṇḍapa.

p.hi: Vikrama-pāṇḍyadēva (Acc. 1283 A.D.): Year lost. C. 13th cent.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged and incomplete.
It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumalar mādu poruvaraimārpuṟa and mentions the queen Ulagamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ.
It appears to record a sale of land in favour of the temple in the western parts of Ambalattāḍinallūr alias Maṇaṟpaḍaivīḍu, built by Śēyyāṉ Tūmāmaṇi, a palace servant of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumalarmātu poruvaraimārpuṟap poruppāmaṭantai tiruppuyam puṇara maṅkaipārmicai nāmicainavila kacciyum kaliṅkamuṅ kaṅkamum vaṅkamuṅ
kucciyuṅ kollamum vallamiraṭṭi mirāṭamumiḻamutalāmuraṭavum vaintar muṟai muṟai pukuntu kūṭal māḷikaik kopuramukappilāṭakak kuvaiyumāṉai
yuṅ kāṭṭap pativayiṟ cellappatañ ciṟitaruḷeṉṟetiretir vaṇaṅkiyeval keṭpap porupuli cilaiyuṭaṉ pukaliṭanteṭa Orutaṉimeruvilirukayal vaḷara muttamiḻi nāvalarutta māvāyaṉ nāṉma
ṟaiyāḷaroṭu kolmuṟaiyetta Aimpulaṉ kaṭantor tam parivakala Āṟu camaiyamum viṟupeṟṟuyara Eḻumukil tavaḻu muḻumaṇ neṭuṅkoṭṭeṉa kaḷiṟu cumanta maṇakaḷikūrattikkamāppa
ṭuttu cakkarañcella veṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappap pavaḷamu tavaḷat taṇkkuṭai taṇṇilavu corintu maṇmuḻutu niḻaṟṟa
tumetaka viḷaṅka kaṭalilamute kaḻaṉikkarumpe vaṭavaraic
colaimaṭamāmayile Eḻulakuṭaiya caiyamalar kuvitakuñcemmalarc ciṟaṭittilatavā
ṇutal ceyyaṭik karuṅkaṇ Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyā ntaruḷiya śrīvikkiramapāṇṭiya te tu Ampalattāṭinallūrāṉa maṇappaṭaiviṭṭu
nāyaṉār ciṟutañcapātañ cevittu ni ṭai Āṟupaṭai Ārāṭcci nāyaka muṟ Ivvūrilt tirumeṟkoyil maturai nāyaṉā
r Akapparivārattu ceyyāṉa tūmāmaṇiya lacekara Ukantaruḷuvitta tirumeṟ � mperumāṉ koyililc ceṉāpati Āḻ vārkku tāṅkaḷ viṟṟu
Digital edition of SII 26.478 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
